ABCL._status: CATALYST ALERT — hold for Phase 2 ABCL635 efficacy readout Q3 2026. Entry $4.50-5.25 on pullback pre-data OR at market on Phase 2 positive. No entry above $5.25 pre-data. Size 1.0% initial; scale to 1.5% if Phase 2 positive
ABCL._thesis_break: T1: pharma partners develop in-house antibody discovery at comparable throughput and abandon ABCL platform; T2: Hansen departs and replacement explicitly deprioritises platform R&D investment; T3: two or more of Lilly/AbbVie/Biogen/Regeneron simultaneously terminate multi-year strategic programs; T4: partner program count declines >20% in one year without strategic consolidation explanation; T5: competing AI antibody discovery platform achieves demonstrated parity in drug approval rate at production scale; T6: Health Canada or FDA structural removal; T7: mRNA or gene therapy paradigm eliminates antibody drug modality as therapeutic class
